claims.live_value: The directory where nightly backup run records are written is empty; no run record, snapshot log, or receipt exists to confirm the backup completed.
Script hard-codes TARGET="vol-legacy" and destroys only that volume.

notes: Do NOT run wipe_old_volume.sh: the backup it depends on is an unverified core claim at the standard dial, and self-acceptance is not permitted. Next action: obtain evidence of a successful backup (run record/snapshot listing) or named-operator acceptance before any irreversible volume destroy.
